programme.title: Marked for Death
programme.desc: A former drug agent (Steven Seagal) and his old Army buddy (Keith David) exterminate a so-called Jamaican drug posse.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: Green Beret veteran Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) takes on a Pacific Northwest sheriff (Brian Dennehy) and the National Guard.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: A former Green Beret goes on a reconnaissance mission to spring MIAs from a Viet Cong prison.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Former Special Forces agent John Rambo blasts through Soviet-occupied Afghanistan in search of his captive mentor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives feel a woman is withholding information when they probe the murder of her wealthy husband and very young daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Evidence points Detectives Briscoe and Curtis in the direction of a fascist youth gathering after the brutal beating and murder of a high-school girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting sends police divers into the Hudson River where they find a VW bus linked to a murder case closed in the 1960s during student uprisings.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a parolee's corpse in a car trunk sends detectives after a suspect that bounty hunters also want, dead or alive.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis probe the murder of a popular Harlem community leader; McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a corpse in Battery Park reunites squads when the victim turns out to be a Baltimore official. (Concluding on

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a girl who managed to die, unnoticed, amid the hustle and bustle of an ER's waiting room.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a possible homicide while probing the assault of a retired divorce attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a police officer who was shot while on an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the shooting of an investigative reporter to a sensationalized murder case, closed 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Family secrets unravel when detectives look for motives for a college professor being thrown into the path of a subway train.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a corporate mogul's death, caused by an overdose of a drug that enhances sexual performance.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the murder of an audio-system installer links to the mob, McCoy's office must ensure witnesses' safety.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons
programme.desc: Andrew Scott narrates a special programme about winter and explores how animals and plants rise to the challenges it brings.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons
programme.desc: Celebrate the glorious nature of summer on Earth and the extraordinary ways in which animals and plants respond to challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Oceans dominate the world's weather systems while supporting a wide range of life.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Predators utilize marshes created by tides; finback and humpback whales; sand crabs; surfing snails; dolphins.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Plankton use sunlight as an energy source in temperate-sea habitats.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Examining the fragile ecosystems and colorful life surrounding coral reefs.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Half-moon fish; loggerhead turtles; schools of sardines and tuna; vastness of the ocean.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Breeding forces animals to come onto land; eagles; marine iguana; Olive Ridley turtles; killer whales hunt sea lion pups; rockhopper penguins.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Life on the edge of frozen seas near the North and South poles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Mountain ranges, perpetual night, pressure and temperature extremes create unusual life forms.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a Capitol policeman springs into action to save his child and protect the president from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One man's brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after it's revealed he's a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organization known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: A cold and mysterious character working at a cash truck company responsible for moving a lot of money around Los Angeles each week.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One man's brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after it's revealed he's a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organization known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: A cold and mysterious character working at a cash truck company responsible for moving a lot of money around Los Angeles each week.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Land of Israel With Jon Voight: God's Story
programme.desc: Abraham plants a shade tree and sets up a kind of roadside inn where he teaches travelers about his God; Jon Voight visits Abraham's historical well in Beersheba.

programme.title: Starlets: The Ladies Who Made Hollywood
programme.desc: Hollywood's original leading ladies pioneered roles in front of and behind the camera. From Mary Pickford fighting the studios for actors' rights, to Barbara Stanwyck blazing across the screen, pushing boundaries, they shaped the film industry.

programme.title: Jackie O: A Remarkable Life
programme.desc: Jacqueline Kennedy Onassis captivates the world as first lady with grace and elegance; but behind the glamorous facade is a woman of resilience, navigating loss and triumph.

programme.title: America's Actor: Gene Hackman
programme.desc: The truth, trials, and ultimate triumph, both on- and off-screen, of one of America's great treasures.

programme.title: Tough Guys: The Men Who Made Hollywood
programme.desc: They are the burly men we look up to, and the villains we love to boo. Movies wouldn't be the same without the tough guys - they brought drama to the big screen and kept audiences in the seats.

programme.desc: The Russian defense stalls a massive panzer attack, north of the Kursk salient.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: SS troops battle Russian defenders in the Russian village of Prokhorovka in the largest tank battle.

programme.title: Nazi's on Trial: Nuremberg in Colour
programme.desc: After almost six years of the Second World War, Germany surrenders unconditionally on May 8; Adolf Hitler, Germany's dictator commits suicide a month before, leaving his country to fall apart.

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor Narrated by Tom Selleck
programme.desc: Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese planes drop torpedoes and bombs on a stunned American Pacific fleet at Pearl Harbor and the United States is thrown into World War II.

programme.desc: RAV host Eric Bolling hosts weekdays for an honest, unfiltered take on the issues shaping America's future.

programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: How to fight back against the enemy when anxiety attacks.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh, Jackie Hill Perry, Toni Collier, Lisa Whittle and Elyse Mahan share why God designed people for community and how meaningful friendships can bring strength, healing and hope.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Jesus will bring an end to all war.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: How to fight back against the enemy when anxiety attacks.

programme.title: Harvest With Pastor Greg Laurie
programme.desc: Join Pastor Greg Laurie for a time of encouragement, worship and Bible study.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Join Joseph in uncovering God's heart to heal unconditionally and receive your healing breakthrough!

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Southern Gospel
programme.desc: Given a second chance, a rebellious rock star follows in his father's footsteps and becomes a preacher. However, his desire to share a message of forgiveness gets tested at every turn.

programme.desc: Given a second chance, a rebellious rock star follows in his father's footsteps and becomes a preacher. However, his desire to share a message of forgiveness gets tested at every turn.

programme.desc: The Gaither Vocal Band performs with a host of gospel artists from all across the United States; it is headed by Bill and Gloria Gaither.

programme.desc: Discussing the benefits of Jordan Rubin and Josh Axe's product Lion's Mane supplements.

programme.title: My First Trip to Israel
programme.desc: The journey starts in Ginosar Valley on a boat, much like the one Jesus and his disciples would've ridden in.

programme.desc: Factual in-depth information about the ongoing war, providing viewers with clear insight into tactical maneuvers and key military events.

programme.desc: Joel C. Rosenberg is a respected geopolitical expert on the Middle East. Each week, he offers a close-up view of current events and issues in this volatile region, bringing important insights and biblical perspective.

programme.desc: Tre and Cierra Boston rescue a house in Louisville, Mississippi after it was damaged in a flood; with only five days to pull it off, they transform the property into a sportsman's lodge themed home.

programme.title: News10NBC Saturday Today at 6AM

programme.title: 2026 Open Championship
programme.desc: The 154th Open Championship enters Moving Day at Royal Birkdale Golf Club as golfers chase leaders. The remaining field tackles the 7,223-yard, par-70 links course, fighting to position themselves for Sunday's final 18-hole round.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The regional finals begin as ninjas from the eastern region?compete for a spot in the national finals; the Tripleheader, a supersized three-lane racecourse, makes a return as ninjas go head-to-head-to-head?in high speed, side-by-side races.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A beloved Staten Island teacher is found dead in the home she shared with her husband; an unknown number in her cell phone leads investigators to reveal troubles in her seemingly idyllic life -- and to ultimately unearth her killer.

programme.desc: Homes that are curated for living in luxury and style.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: After two beloved Dartmouth professors are found slain in their home, investigators wade through hundreds of suspects and snowy conditions to find their suspects are on the run.

programme.title: 2026 Open Championship
programme.desc: The 154th Open Championship concludes at Royal Birkdale Golf Club as the winner claims the trophy. Final-round pairs complete the 72-hole stroke play tournament, crowning the champion who earns the Claret Jug and a huge share of the purse.
